simple_types.name: SPI_Status
simple_types.code:
type SPI_Status is
  (Ok,
   Err_Error,
   Err_Timeout,
   Busy);

array_types.name: SPI_Data_16b
array_types.code: type SPI_Data_16b is array (Natural range <>) of UInt16;

array_types.name: SPI_Data_8b
array_types.code: type SPI_Data_8b is array (Natural range <>) of UInt8;

access_types.name: Any_SPI_Port
access_types.code: type Any_SPI_Port is access all SPI_Port'Class;

subprograms.name: Receive
Receive
Transmit
Transmit
